{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320164243078D4AAB9F8253626EA8\"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374085209689473818","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很不错！它以系统的方式阐述历史，让复杂的历史知识变得清晰明了，还把人物故事融入其中，让历史更鲜活。而且每章都有思维导图，方便记忆。对我这种有孩子的人来说，非常适合和孩子一起读，帮助他们建立历史知识体系。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1714796449,"group_id":"7363486262725971006","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N67F30Bk8eEFwPdRTR2xLhL52v1u2D8pryZi+oDowxao","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1717910051228233","user_name":"柳府的李水水"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1717910051228233","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7363486262725971006","book_info":{"abstract":"以人教版历史教材七年级、八年级、九年级为参考，把历史事件按照时间发展，依从各个不同时代划分为章，再把政治、经济、文化等划分为节，系统阐述历史，既有横向,也有纵向。主要内容涵盖战争、政治、文化、思想到科技、艺术、国家交往、经济、名人等，将历史线索、时间、过程、事件、影响等呈现清晰，将人物故事融入到历史长河当中。每一小节整理若干知识点，每一章都有系统的思维导图，做到清晰、明了、记忆清楚。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/8eaf1dd6d263cf0cff9cbbfd2121564c~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"王金辉 著 蔡月
